channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping, 3rd March
item.description:
Mattress and bags dumped by church at 107 Palmerston Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Palmerston Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter where buses stand near the Common, 3rd March
item.description:
It would be great if this area was swept regularly or even a bin installed for the drivers.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Common, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: These pieces of abandoned rubbish were left in front on our house, 3rd March
item.description:
It seems that the bed, which was abandoned together with these things, was taken either by someone or Hackney Council already, but the remaining abandoned rubbish is still left in front of our house

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kersley Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old Christmas tree, 3rd March
item.description:
The remnants of a Christmas tree have been left next to the bins. Could this be collected, please? Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Debris/cement on road danger to motorcycles, 3rd March
item.description:
Hardened debris/cement and chippings in the middle of each lane - both directions - are a danger to motorcycles, particularly when braking! This needs to be removed asap.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Knee Hill, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking sign vandalized (Allerton St to Murray Grove), 3rd March
item.description:
Car parking sign vandalized. Located in Allerton street to Murray Grove, right next to 13 Murray Grove (North city one).

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Murray Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping Picton St ourtside buly waste cage, 3rd March
item.description:
Please collect before the pile grows

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Picton Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot Hole, 3rd March
item.description:
Large pot hole needs repairing
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Longleigh Lane, Bexleyheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes and scooters completely blocking pavement, 3rd March
item.description:
This is about 5th time I’ve seen bikes and scooters blocking access for pedestrians which suggests it happens often. As you can see from photo they are next to a dedicated parking bay so spilling over from that. Anyone with a buggy, luggage or in a mobility scooter would be completely blocked from walking this route and forced into the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-21, Carew Street, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot Hole, 3rd March
item.description:
There are multiple pot hole on Bostall Hill that need repairing. Please arrange to inspect the length of road to see each of the pot holes that need repairs. Thanks
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bostall Hill, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The bulb is broken., 3rd March
item.description:
There are roadworks on Mantle road, meaning they have replacement traffic lights. However, the bulb is not working properly creating an unsafe situation.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 175, Brockley Road, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Badly lifted kerb on footpath outside 22 Park Road EN4 9QA, 3rd March
item.description:
A large van has dislodged the kerb and lifted it out of place causing a bad trip hazard outside our house. We cross this road every day with children going to school and I worry they will trip into the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Road, New Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Shacklewell lane, 3rd March
item.description:
A mattress, other pieces of furniture and boxes left on the street / by entrance to apartment building.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shacklewell Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping no previous collection (January 26), 3rd March
item.description:
Fly tip-Ferry place back of Hare street Fly tip has been reported remedial works have been promised but not carried out CCTV apparently installed yet no action taken Fly tip is growing consistently and considerably larger every day. Two neighbours moved out and dumped all of their items post moving out. Urgent action needs to be taken.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich High Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roof on Council managed shelter, 3rd March
item.description:
The roof on the council managed shelter is dangerous and needs urgent repair.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 1 Leighton Road, 3rd March
item.description:
Directly outside the gate to 1 Leighton Road the paving around the remains of an old lamppost is very raised at the base and poses an extreme hazard especially at night. It's been like this for a few months, although I cannot remember when the top half of the lamppost was removed. I think there may have been successive works on that part of the pavement which may have led to it worsening. I recently tripped and fell on the way back into my house having not realised how close I was to the paving and experienced significant bruising. It's very hard to avoid as the pavement is relatively narrow.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 292-294, Kentish Town Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa dumped, 3rd March
item.description:
Sofa dumped near bins

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-39, Chilton Grove, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 3rd March
item.description:
Rubbis on estate

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Windsor Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 3rd March
item.description:
Several weeks ago a van dumped a fridge freezer outside of no. 31Waterfield Close SE28 8DD. Since then someone else has dumped several green bags of clothes next to the fridge freezer.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Celandine Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress near the school car park, 3rd March
item.description:
This mattress has been here for a couple of days now. Someone keeps flytipping by the school.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Battery Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet
